title: 8 Requesting a Dormant Period and Cancelling AFT Service
body_text:
8	Requesting a Dormant Period and Cancelling AFT Service
8.1	Requesting a Dormant Period
To request a dormant period for an AFT Transaction, the Payor/Payee can complete the AFT Dormant Period Request, Form 2044, and provide it to the Originator.
Proceed as follows:
The Originator enters the number of days notice that are required in the Originator Notification Requirement section of the AFT Dormant Period Request, Form 2044. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: AFT Dormant Period Request, Form 2044
The Payor/Payee completes the form and returns it to the Originator.
The Originator enters the dormant period in
PaymentStream
AFT.
The Originator retains a copy of the request.
Related Information
AFT Dormant Period Request,
Form 2044
8.2	Cancelling PaymentStream AFT Service
Cancellation of AFT service is governed by the Letter of Undertaking for Pre-authorized Debit Plans, Form 1904, the Letter of Undertaking for Cash Management PADs, Form 2007, or the Direct Deposit Agreement, Form 2043. To cancel
PaymentStream
AFT Service, complete the
PaymentStream
AFT Service Application, Form 5329. See Figure 2.
Complete the Financial Institution Information section.
Select
Delete OID
and record the Originator number (ten digits).
Record the Legal Company Name and the Originator Long Name in the Originator ID Information section.
Have two authorized financial institution Signing Officers sign the form.
Forward the
PaymentStream
AFT Service Application, Form 5329, as directed on the form.
Figure 2: PaymentStream AFT Service Application, Form 5329
Central聽1 will cancel the AFT Originator ID, upon receipt of the
PaymentStream
AFT Service Application, Form 5329, from your financial institution.
Related Information
Letter of Undertaking for Pre-authorized Debit Plans,
Form 1904
Letter of Undertaking for Cash Management PADs,
Form 2007
Direct Deposit Agreement,
Form 2043
PaymentStream
AFT Service Application,
Form 5329
8.3	Cancelling AFT Service via FTP
Cancellation of AFT service is governed by the Letter of Undertaking for Pre-authorized Debit Plans, Form 1904, the Letter of Undertaking for Cash Management PADs, Form 2007, or the Direct Deposit Agreement, Form 2043.
To cancel AFT Service via FTP for an Originator, complete the Application for AFT Service via FTP, Form 1378. See Figure 3.
Note:	This form is for BC and Atlantic regions only.
Figure 3: Application for AFT Service via FTP, Form 1378
Complete the Financial Institution Information section.
Select 芒聙聹Delete OID芒聙聺 and record the Originator ID number (ten digits).
Record the Legal Company Name in the Originator ID Information section.
Authorized financial institution Signing Officers must sign the form.
Forward the completed form as directed in the Instructions section on the form.
Central聽1 will cancel the AFT Originator ID upon receiving the Application for AFT Service, Form 1378.
Related Information
Application for AFT Service via FTP,
Form 1378
Letter of Undertaking for Pre-authorized Debit Plans,
Form 1904
Letter of Undertaking for Cash Management PADs,
Form 2007
Direct Deposit Agreement,
Form 2043
END
